clock_hint: Use the tray menu or start recording from this page.
transcript_hintListening: Listening for speech… segments appear after VAD completes a phrase.
transcript_hintRecent: Recent transcript from the last recording session.
transcript_hintDefault: Live transcript appears here while recording.
notes_privacy: Audio never leaves your device. Summaries run through your local Ollama setup.
notes_aiValidation: AI notes model is validated on start.
alert_transcriptionDegraded: Transcription encountered an issue during this session. Audio recording is still active.
alert_modelBlocked: Transcription model not set up. Go to Models to download it before recording.
error_modelNotSetUp: Transcription model not set up. Open Models to download it before recording.
error_ollamaNotReady: AI notes model not ready. Open Models to finish Ollama configuration before recording.
error_ollamaVerify: Unable to verify AI notes model readiness. Open Models and retry.
error_sessionStart: Session failed to start. Verify audio permissions and model files, then retry.
error_sessionStop: Stopping the session failed. Please retry from the widget or tray controls.
error_shortcutStop: Unable to stop session from shortcut.
error_shortcutPause: Unable to pause session from shortcut.
error_shortcutResume: Unable to resume session from shortcut.
